backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Student, Notice, and Exam types with in-memory storage and CRUD query/update methods for a school portal backend.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three product features (dashboard pages, visual theme, hero assets) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used across the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing active page state and rendering Header, Footer, and the selected page (Home, Students, NoticesBoard, ExamSchedule).
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Reusable empty state UI component displaying an icon, title, and description when a list has no data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing school branding, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with Navodaya emblem logo, school title, desktop nav buttons, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu using the maroon/gold theme.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Reusable page header component rendering an optional icon, title, subtitle, and an optional action slot in a responsive layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and persisted identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating students, notices, and exams via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on successful mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a Navodaya maroon-and-gold theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSchedule.tsx: Page component that displays a sortable exam schedule table with upcoming/past badges, and provides a dialog form to add new exams via the useAddExam mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Dashboard home page showing stat cards for total students, notices, and exams, plus sections for recent notices and upcoming exams with navigation callbacks.
frontend/src/pages/NoticesBoard.tsx: Page component that lists school notices sorted by date with expandable content, and includes a dialog form to add new notices via the useAddNotice mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Students.tsx: React page component that displays a searchable grid of student cards with name, class, house, and roll number, and includes a dialog form for adding new students via the useAddStudent hook.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom maroon and gold color palettes, serif/sans font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Navodaya App tracking existing features (frontend dashboard, visual theme, hero banner), pending backend feature requests, and required image assets.
